context: Tests whether the agent uses extract-resources.py for initial resource extraction from an outline, produces correctly structured JSON output, filters out code-block and image-prompt URLs, deduplicates, and categorizes resources by type.

checklist.name: Extraction script used
checklist.description: The workflow-log.md references extract-resources.py as the tool used for extraction. The agent did not manually scan the outline and compile the list by hand

checklist.name: Valid JSON output
checklist.description: resources.json is valid JSON with top-level keys 'talk_slug', 'extracted_at', and 'resources' (an array)

checklist.name: Talk slug from spec
checklist.description: The talk_slug field in resources.json is '2026-04-16-devnexus-robocoders-judgment-day', matching the Presentation Spec. Not invented or abbreviated

checklist.name: Code block URL excluded
checklist.description: The URL 'https://example.com/api/v1/not-a-resource' (inside a python code block) does NOT appear in resources.json

checklist.name: Image prompt URL excluded
checklist.description: The URL 'https://not-a-resource.example.com/should/be/ignored' (inside an Image prompt field) does NOT appear in resources.json

checklist.name: Duplicate URL deduplicated
checklist.description: The URL 'https://dora.dev' appears at most once in the resources array despite appearing twice in the outline (slides 12 and mentioned again)

checklist.name: Multiple resource types present
checklist.description: The resources array contains entries with at least 3 different 'type' values from: url, repo, book, rfc, tool

checklist.name: Book references extracted
checklist.description: At least one resource with type 'book' exists, referencing either 'Accelerate' or 'The Pragmatic Programmer' from the outline

checklist.name: RFC references extracted
checklist.description: At least one resource with type 'rfc' exists, referencing RFC 9421, RFC 7519, or RFC 2119 from the outline

checklist.name: Each resource has slide context
checklist.description: Resources in the array include a 'slide_nums' field (array of integers) or a 'context' field indicating which slide(s) they came from

checklist.name: Script command includes --spec argument
checklist.description: The workflow-log.md shows the extraction command included a --spec argument pointing to presentation-spec.md (to obtain the talk slug)
